_publications._publicationTitle: NF1-Specific Growth Charts for Head Circumference Over the First 3 Years of Life.

_contextSnippet: These centile lines enclosed 95.4% of NF1 head circumference data between 3rd and 97th centiles, as against 76.7% between the corresponding CDC centiles
details: LMSz method produced NF1-specific charts that enclosed 95.4% of NF1 head circumference data between 3rd and 97th centiles, compared to 76.7% for CDC centiles
